_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the CredProvider-path known-issue scenario (known-issue-robot-defect playbook). The agent chains: folders list -> jobs list --state Faulted -> jobs get (Info: CredProvider TEMP path) -> jobs logs (known defect on builds < 23.10.9) -> machines list (RobotVersion 23.10.4). Correct fix: upgrade Robot to >= 23.10.9 (ROBO-4022), NOT create the folder / fix TEMP permissions. Keys are stable.
